changeSet.author: armorsight
changeSet.sql:
-- ── Report Sections ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO utm_report_section (rep_sec_name, rep_sec_description, rep_sec_system, rep_sec_short_name, creation_user, creation_date) VALUES ('Compliance Reports', 'Regulatory compliance and audit reports', true, 'COMPLIANCE', 'system', NOW()), ('Security Operations', 'Threat detection, alerts, and incident summary reports', true, 'SECURITY_OPS', 'system', NOW()), ('Executive Summary', 'High-level security posture and KPI reports', true, 'EXECUTIVE', 'system', NOW()), ('Vulnerability Reports', 'Asset vulnerability and patch status reports', true, 'VULNERABILITY','system', NOW());
-- ── Report Templates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO utm_report (rep_name, rep_description, report_section_id, rep_type, rep_module, rep_short_name, rep_http_method, rep_url, creation_user, creation_date) VALUES -- Compliance ('PCI-DSS Compliance Report', 'Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard compliance summary with control status and violations.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'COMPLIANCE'), 'TEMPLATE', 'COMPLIANCE', 'PCI_DSS', 'GET', '/compliance/pci-dss', 'system', NOW()),
('HIPAA Compliance Report', 'Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act compliance status and audit trail.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'COMPLIANCE'), 'TEMPLATE', 'COMPLIANCE', 'HIPAA', 'GET', '/compliance/hipaa', 'system', NOW()),
('ISO 27001 Compliance Report', 'ISO/IEC 27001 information security management system control assessment.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'COMPLIANCE'), 'TEMPLATE', 'COMPLIANCE', 'ISO_27001', 'GET', '/compliance/iso27001', 'system', NOW()),
('NIST CSF Compliance Report', 'NIST Cybersecurity Framework identify, protect, detect, respond, and recover function status.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'COMPLIANCE'), 'TEMPLATE', 'COMPLIANCE', 'NIST_CSF', 'GET', '/compliance/nist-csf', 'system', NOW()),
-- Security Operations ('Alert Summary Report', 'Summary of all security alerts by severity, category, and status over a selected time range.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'SECURITY_OPS'), 'TEMPLATE', 'ALERTS', 'ALERT_SUMMARY', 'POST', '/alerts/summary', 'system', NOW()),
('Incident Response Report', 'Open and closed incidents with MITRE ATT&CK mapping, response times, and resolution details.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'SECURITY_OPS'), 'TEMPLATE', 'INCIDENTS', 'INCIDENT_REPORT', 'POST', '/incidents/report', 'system', NOW()),
('Threat Intelligence Report', 'Indicators of compromise, threat actor activity, and feed hit summary.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'SECURITY_OPS'), 'TEMPLATE', 'THREAT_INTEL', 'THREAT_INTEL', 'POST', '/threat-intel/report', 'system', NOW()),
-- Executive ('Executive Security Summary', 'Board-level overview: risk score trend, top threats, open incidents, and SLA metrics.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'EXECUTIVE'), 'TEMPLATE', 'EXECUTIVE', 'EXEC_SUMMARY', 'GET', '/executive/summary', 'system', NOW()),
('Monthly Security Posture Report', 'Month-over-month comparison of events, alerts, incidents, and remediation velocity.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'EXECUTIVE'), 'TEMPLATE', 'EXECUTIVE', 'MONTHLY_POSTURE', 'GET', '/executive/monthly', 'system', NOW()),
-- Vulnerability ('Asset Vulnerability Report', 'Per-asset vulnerability findings with CVSS scores, affected software, and patch status.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'VULNERABILITY'), 'TEMPLATE', 'VULNERABILITY', 'ASSET_VULN', 'POST', '/vulnerability/assets', 'system', NOW()),
('Top Vulnerabilities Report', 'Top 20 critical vulnerabilities across the environment ranked by exploitability and impact.', (SELECT id FROM utm_report_section WHERE rep_sec_short_name = 'VULNERABILITY'), 'TEMPLATE', 'VULNERABILITY', 'TOP_VULNS', 'GET', '/vulnerability/top', 'system', NOW());
